'''Morjakar''' was a [[Planetoid/Legends|planetoid]] originally from a [[Star system/Legends|system]] on the opposite side of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]], when its [[Star/Legends|star]] swelled into a red giant, swallowing all of its [[Planet/Legends|planets]] except Morjakar. This seemed to disrupt the balance between the planet's [[Gravity/Legends|gravity]] and centrifugal force, and Morjakar was sent spiraling off into deep [[Realspace/Legends|space]]. It eventually entered the [[Cularin system/Legends|Cularin system]] (although it did not become a part of it), and was caught in the massive gravity well of the system's [[Binary star system/Legends|binary stars]]. It settled into an eccentric [[Orbit/Legends|orbit]] at an odd angle from the rest of the system's planets, and was sometimes missed by [[Scout/Legends|scouts]].<ref name="LFC">''[[Living Force Campaign Guide]]''</ref>

It was not known to have been inhabited, although no proper research had been made on it as of [[31 BBY/Legends|31 BBY]].<ref name="LFC" />

{{Planet-stub}}
